mnemonics.title: BAYES RULE FORMULA
mnemonics.content: POSSTERIOR = LIKELIHOOD × PRIOR / EVIDENCE - Remember: P(H|E) = P(E|H) × P(H) / P(E)

mnemonics.title: EXPERT SYSTEM COMPONENTS
mnemonics.content: KIND EIE - KNOWLEDGE BASE + INFERENCE ENGINE + EXPLANATION FACILITY + USER INTERFACE

mnemonics.title: AI TASKS TO REMEMBER
mnemonics.content: LORD PPL - LEARNING, REASONING, PROBLEM-SOLVING, PERCEPTION, PLANNING, LANGUAGE

mnemonics.title: WUMPUS WORLD HAZARDS
mnemonics.content: PITS PIERCE, WUMPUS WRECKS - Both are deadly to the agent

acronyms.usage: The field of creating intelligent machines
System that mimics human expertise in a domain
Storage of facts and rules in an expert system
Component that applies rules to derive conclusions

acronyms.expansion: Probability of A given B has occurred

visualTips.visualization: Think of it as UPDATING beliefs - Prior is your initial guess, Evidence is new information, Posterior is your revised guess after considering evidence
Draw arrows from cause to effect - if A causes B, draw arrow from A to B. The arrows show which variables directly influence others
Forward = FLOWER blooming from bottom to top (facts to conclusions). Backward = climbing down from a tree (goal to facts)
Imagine a cave with rooms - agent starts at [1,1], Wumpus at [2,1], gold at random, pits in other rooms. Use smell and breeze clues!

analogies.analogy: Like a family tree - traits (nodes) are passed down (edges) from parents to children, but not all traits depend on all ancestors
Like a detective - takes clues (facts), applies rules of logic (inference rules), and deduces conclusions (new facts)
Like interviewing a veteran employee about trade secrets - the knowledge exists in their head, the challenge is extracting and formalizing it
Like an empty filing cabinet with an assistant - you provide the files (knowledge), the assistant (shell) does the searching and reasoning
